name: Instructor_Eligibility_Clarification_Memo_2026-09-24.pdf
description: Instructor eligibility clarification memo dated 2026-09-24. Supersedes older AOTA guideline framing on modality-only supervision and certain ergonomic assessment sessions. This is the authoritative source for CHT hour categorization decisions. Where this memo and the older Confluence AOTA page from 2024-03-11 disagree, this memo wins per newest-wins rule.
